channel.title: Parametric-Insurance on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Parametric-Insurance on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: From Bets to Hard Utility: Why Prediction Markets are the Next Frontier of Insurance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Exploring the convergence of prediction markets and parametric insurance as the next frontier for real-time risk management and synthetic reinsurance.
